title: Canopy
description: Adds rainforests to Minecraft including 3 new biomes, rainforest mobs and more!
body:
**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1326597/description_fac53176-54be-473f-8dd3-6987d7ff74c7.png)**

# Canopy — Multi-Layered Rainforests

**Canopy adds massive, vertically layered rainforest biomes filled with towering trees, new mobs, unique plants, an underground temple, and survival resources. Experience dense canopies, living forest floors, and hidden underground dangers!**

## Version 1.0.0 Out Now

**Dependency Required:** TerraBlender 4.0.0.2+ [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/terrablender-fabric](url)

***

# Biomes

Canopy adds **three rainforest biome variants**, each built with the vertical layering of the **canopy, understory, and forest floor**

## Rainforest

A dense, foggy biome found near jungles with towering trees and rich vegetation

**Features:**

*   Banana trees
*   Sweet berry bushes
*   Red and brown mushrooms
*   Fern jungle grass & large ferns
*   Jungle trees
*   Kapok trees & Mega Kapok trees
*   Brazil Nut trees & Mega Brazil Nut trees
*   Lily pads
*   Anthills
*   Creatures: Toucans, Monkeys, Frogs, Piranhas, Gorillas

***

## Bamboo Rainforest

A rainforest variant heavily overgrown with bamboo

**Features:**

*   Bamboo forests
*   Banana trees
*   Rainforest ground vegetation
*   Kapok & Brazil Nut trees (including mega variants)
*   Anthills
*   Lily pads
*   Creatures: Toucans, Monkeys, Frogs, Piranhas, Gorillas, Pandas

***

## Muddy Rainforest

A swamp-like rainforest with muddy terrain and mangrove-style vegetation

**Features:**

*   Muddy ground cover
*   Rainforest ground vegetation
*   Kapok & Brazil Nut trees (including mega variants)
*   Banana trees
*   Lily pads
*   Dead bushes
*   Creatures: Toucans, Monkeys, Frogs, Piranhas, Gorillas

***

# Terrain Features

*   **Mega Kapok Trees** — 60–70 block tall giants that form the upper canopy
*   **Kapok Trees** — understory tree layer
*   **Banana Trees** — grow in all rainforest biomes (4–10 blocks tall)
*   **Anthills** — generate in Rainforest and Bamboo Rainforest biomes and contain ants

***

# Structures

## Rainforest Temple

Ancient structures that generate in rainforest biomes. 
Each temple contains an entrance to a large underground dungeon where the **Smash** mob can be found

***

# Mobs

*   **Toucans** — 4 variants, tamable with berries or Brazil nuts
*   **Poison Dart Frogs** — damages anything they touch
*   **Monkeys** — breed-able with bananas
*   **Piranhas** — hunt fish and retaliate when attacked
*   **Smash** — a powerful underground temple mob that throws bouncing rocks  
    Drops: 2–5 Rocks, 0–1 Amethyst Shards
*   **Gorillas** - neutral mobs which retaliate on attack and can be bred with bananas or bamboo (WIP)

***

# Blocks

*   Rafflesia Flower (WIP)
*   Kapok Wood Set
*   Brazil Nut Wood Set
*   Brazil Nut Pods — grow from leaves and can be knocked down with a Trident (craft into 9 Brazil Nuts)
*   Kapok Leaves
*   Liana Vines
*   Banana Stalk
*   Stripped Banana Stalk
*   Banana Leaves
*   Banana Bushel — crafts into 9 Bananas
*   Banana Flower
*   Azure Froglight
*   Fine Dirt — used in Anthills
*   Ants — can be captured in buckets; walking over them without boots causes damage

***

# Items

*   Brazil Nuts — break into 2 Shells + 1 Shelled Nut when used
*   Brazil Nut Shells
*   Shelled Brazil Nuts — food item (2 nutrition, 0.25 saturation)
*   Bananas — food item (4 nutrition, 2 saturation)
*   Rocks — throwable bouncing projectiles
*   Rafflesia Petals (WIP)
*   Bucket of Ants
*   Bucket of Piranha

***

# Advancements

*   **Canopy → Rainforests in Minecraft** — enter any rainforest biome
*   **Below the Surface** — find a Rainforest Temple
*   **The Bare Necessities** — harvest a Banana Bushel
*   **Corpse Lily** — harvest a Rafflesia Flower
*   **Caution: Bounces** — collect a Rock
*   **Where the Trees Touch the Sky** — explore all rainforest biomes

***

# Planned Features

*   Anteaters
*   New potion/effect from Rafflesia Petals
*   Gorilla behavior changes

I hope you enjoy the mod!
